description: Business accounts in Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: 11th or 12th century. The hand of the scribe is probably known. Goitein writes, "Accounts, similar to those in nos. 71 and 77." Mentions people such as Abū l-Faraj Mardūkh and Zakkār and commodities such as brazilwood and pepper.
description_he: חשבונות עסקיים ביהודית-ערבית; המאה ה-11 או ה-12; מזכיר אבו אל-פרג' מרדוך וזקאר וסחורות כגון עץ ברזיל ופלפל
